subject: Fleet-update fan-out: feature priority=high
message: OAuth-pivot SCAFFOLDED + SMOKE-TESTED 16/16. NEW automations/claude-oauth-accounts.ps1 (Login/Use/Active/List/LogoutSlot/WhoAmI/RotateToNext/MarkLimited/Migrate). Schema migrated: auth_mode (oauth|api_key) + display_name + oauth_email + quota_resets_at_utc + weekly_reset_at_utc on every row (idempotent). start-sinister-session.ps1 swaps OAuth creds atomically before spawn + does NOT export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for oauth slots (would hijack Max billing to Console). EVE.exe account_manager.py + eve.py onboarding picker offer OAuth (recommended Max pool) vs API key (legacy). Operator action needed: run powershell -File automations\claude-oauth-accounts.ps1 -Action Login -Name <slot> + click OAuth in browser for each Max 20x account they want pooled. Doctrine: _shared-memory/knowledge/oauth-pivot-max-quota-pooling-2026-05-24.md.
rationale: Overseer auto-distributed because this fleet-update either targeted you OR mentioned your lane slug. Review + ack if actionable.
